positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~mean_to_animals(tom)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    grumpy(tom)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    ~nice_to_animals(sK0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~mean_to_animals(X0) | ~nice_to_animals(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    grumpy(sK0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    mean_to_animals(sK0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~animal_lover(X0) | nice_to_animals(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define pet_owner(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define love_animals(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u19,axiom,
    grumpy(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mean_to_animals(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define nice_to_animals(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define animal_lover(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define pet_owner(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define love_animals(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
